import base64, pathlib, zipfile, shutil, os, subprocess, sys, time
zip_b64 = ''''''
root = pathlib.Path('/content/Mira-clone')
zip_path = pathlib.Path('/content/Mira-clone-post-posix.zip')
zip_path.write_bytes(base64.b64decode(zip_b64))
shutil.rmtree(root, ignore_errors=True)
root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
with zipfile.ZipFile(zip_path) as zf:
    zf.extractall(root)
os.chdir(root)

import torch
print('torch', torch.__version__, 'cuda', torch.cuda.is_available(), torch.cuda.get_device_name(0) if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'CPU')
print('cwd', os.getcwd())
subprocess.run([sys.executable, '-m', 'pip', 'install', '-q', '-r', 'requirements.txt'], check=True)

steps = 50000
epochs = 8
batch_size = 32
t0 = time.time()
subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'scripts/generate_toy_arena_npz.py', '--out', 'data/toy_arena_128_50k.npz', '--steps', str(steps), '--size', '128'], check=True)
print('data seconds', round(time.time() - t0, 1))
t1 = time.time()
subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'scripts/train_next_frame.py', '--data', 'data/toy_arena_128_50k.npz', '--epochs', str(epochs), '--batch-size', str(batch_size), '--out-dir', 'runs/toy_arena_128'], check=True)
print('train seconds', round(time.time() - t1, 1))
subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'scripts/rollout_preview.py', '--data', 'data/toy_arena_128_50k.npz', '--checkpoint', 'runs/toy_arena_128/best.pt', '--out', 'runs/toy_arena_128/preview.gif', '--steps', '64'], check=True)
subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'scripts/make_post_preview.py', '--in', 'runs/toy_arena_128/preview.gif', '--gif-out', 'runs/toy_arena_128/post_preview.gif', '--mp4-out', 'runs/toy_arena_128/post_preview.mp4', '--scale', '4', '--fps', '12'], check=True)
print('total seconds', round(time.time() - t0, 1))
from IPython.display import Image, HTML, display
display(Image(filename='runs/toy_arena_128/post_preview.gif'))
display(HTML('<video controls loop autoplay muted src="runs/toy_arena_128/post_preview.mp4" style="max-width:100%;"></video>'))
print('ARTIFACT_GIF=/content/Mira-clone/runs/toy_arena_128/post_preview.gif')
print('ARTIFACT_MP4=/content/Mira-clone/runs/toy_arena_128/post_preview.mp4')
